title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
jsonLd.skills: JavaScript, TypeScript, Machine Learning, AWS, Python, REST APIs, Node.js, Microservices
